description: Auto-approve the status-board plugin's own read-only render script. Scoped via `if` to ONLY this bundled scanner (any --scope arg); never touches other commands. The `if` uses permission-rule syntax, where ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} is NOT expanded — so it anchors on a glob of the stable script-path suffix (`*status-board/scripts/status_board.py*`) instead of the install-/version-specific absolute path. Tradeoff: a suffix glob is slightly broader than a full-path anchor, but the matched script is read-only; the plugin's write actions (bootstrap mkdir/touch/cp) are deliberately NOT covered and still prompt. Both `python3` and the `python` fallback are matched. User consent is granted at plugin install/trust time.
